mapper.update: UPDATE UB_MEMBER um SET um.member_state = '계정 삭제' WHERE um.member_number = #{memberNumber} AND um.member_type IN ('MENTOR', 'MENTEE', 'NODECIDED') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM UB_MATCHING m WHERE m.matching_state = '매칭중' AND ( (um.member_type = 'MENTOR' AND um.member_number = m.mentor_number) OR (um.member_type = 'MENTEE' AND um.member_number = m.mentee_number) ) )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT um.member_number, um.member_name, NVL(um.member_type, 'UNKNOWN') AS "member_type" CASE WHEN um.member_type = 'MENTOR' THEN mth_mentor.matching_state WHEN um.member_type = 'MENTEE' THEN mth_mentee.matching_state WHEN um.member_type = 'NODECIDED' THEN ius.survey_approval ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS "member_state" FROM UB_MEMBER um LEFT JOIN UB_MATCHING mth_mentor ON um.member_type = 'MENTOR' AND um.member_number = mth_mentor.mentor_number LEFT JOIN UB_MATCHING mth_mentee ON um.member_type = 'MENTEE' AND um.member_number = mth_mentee.mentee_number WHERE um.member_type IN ('MENTOR', 'MENTEE', 'NODECIDED') AND um.member_number = #{memberNubmer}
